description: Manifest checksum does not match computed checksum of source artifacts (drift)

details.note: This fixture has valid content but wrong manifest.checksum. Per §5 Mutation gate: mismatch triggers revalidate; validation passes (no violations), so mutation is permitted. Opening this vault must detect drift; running a mutation must succeed after gate passes. Use compliance/valid/minimal-drifted and mutation add-block-drifted-vault.json to assert mutation-allowed when drifted but valid.
